$comment: Single source of truth (SoT) for the Xpair Remote Desktop screen protocol. host/rd/(serve.rs·serve_webrtc.rs) and client/ide/(remote-desktop.js·extension.js) implement this contract, and check-screen-protocol.sh verifies consistency.

remoteInput.policy: Remote Desktop supports authenticated remote input. The IDE may capture pointer, wheel, text, and keyboard input only inside the RD webview and forward it over the active WebRTC session.
remoteInput.webrtcDataChannels: The RD session uses rp-ctl (reliable ordered control input) and rp-move (unreliable pointer motion) WebRTC DataChannels, gated by host-side input helper readiness.
